subject: [PATCH v5 02/21] nfsd: add protocol support for CB_NOTIFY

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for the CB_NOTIFY protocol to the nfsd kernel module. It updates various header files, including nfs4_1.x and uapi/linux/nfs4.h, to include definitions for NFSv4 constants such as NFS4_VERIFIER_SIZE and NFS4_FHSIZE. The patch also regenerates XDR (External Data Representation) files, which caused conflicts with existing kernel API definitions. To resolve these conflicts, the patch removes duplicate definitions from nfs4.h and uapi/nfs4 header. Userspace consumers who require these constants should obtain them from more authoritative sources.
